Follow-up on #5081, there is a risk of OOM with large page size when chunked prefill is triggered.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fixed prompt length for random dataset
vllm.author: Xarbirus
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
I encountered a problem while using benchmark_serving.py with --dataset-name random. The problem was that when encoding a prompt on the server side, its length in tokens could be longer than required in the benchmark (depending on the tokenizer).
For example: running the benchmark with the following

vllm.title: [Doc] Update notes for H2O-VL and Gemma3
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: From my understanding, head size 80 is only supported by backends that use PagedAttention (e.g. xformers, sdpa). None of those backends are supported in V1 yet.

vllm.title: [Misc] Fix ScalarType float4 naming
vllm.author: LucasWilkinson
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
n just colloquially means Nans are supported, so float4_e2m1fn should not have a n suffix given the NanRepr.NONE
thanks @mgoin for the catch

vllm.title: Fix `dockerfilegraph` pre-commit hook
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Before, the shell script would decide if the Dockerfile had changed by checking staged files.
Now, the shell script receives a list of files to check from pre-commit (which is how hooks normally work) and if one of those changed files is the Dockerfile, the image will be updated.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix triton import with local TritonPlaceholder
vllm.author: MengqingCao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Fix triton import error in non-triton platforms with the local TritonPlaceholder

vllm.title: [V1] Enable TPU V1 backend by default
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Allows for TPU to try to run using V1 by default, rather than always choosing V0

vllm.title: [V1][PP] Support PP for MultiprocExecutor
vllm.author: bigPYJ1151
vllm.bodyExcerpt: By offloading MQ reading to a IO thread, MultiprocExecutor can receive multiple batches in flight and support V1 PP seamlessly.

vllm.title: [v1] AttentionMetadata for each layer
vllm.author: heheda12345
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Should be merge after #17193
This PR changes ForwardContext.attn_metadata from a global one to dict[layer_name, AttentionMetadata] to prepare for hybrid allocator which allocate different block table to sliding window layers and full attention layers. We only need to build one attention metadata for

vllm.title: [Feat] Add deprecated=True to CLI args
vllm.author: aarnphm
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds a small helper to FlexibleArgumentParser to
mark an argument as deprecated, aligning with python 3.13 and above logic
This PR also marks --enable-reasoning as deprecated.
Signed-off-by: Aaron Pham contact@aarnphm.xyz

vllm.title: [Docs] Use gh-file to add links to tool_calling.md
vllm.author: windsonsea
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Provide relative links for examples

vllm.title: [v1] Introduce KVCacheBlocks as interface between Scheduler and KVCacheManager
vllm.author: heheda12345
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
In the future hybrid allocator, the KVCacheManager output would be list[list[list[KVCacheBlocks]], which is much more complex than the current list[KVCacheBlocks].
To hide the complexity, this pr introduces KVCacheBlocks to save the  KVCacheManager output so that scheduler do not need to parse the i

vllm.title: [doc] Add RAG Integration example
vllm.author: reidliu41
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) enhances LLMs by retrieving relevant context from external sources,
improving factual accuracy and grounding. It's widely adopted in modern LLM applications.
This PR introduces basic RAG example using:

vLLM + LangChain + Milvus
vLLM + LlamaIndex + Milvus

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix modality limits in vision language example
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Made a mistake in #15799, the examples don't work with video models at all. Somehow no one reported this in the past weeks...

vllm.author: bythew3i

Increase kv cache block size and reset kernel block shapes based on autotuned results from kernel.
But still need to retune the kernel block shapes in kernel.

Note: we should wait for pytorch/xla#9041 to be checkin and update new torch_xla version in requirements.txt

Benchmarked without cache:
v6e

vllm.title: [Misc] Add Next Edit Prediction (NEP) datasets support in `benchmark_serving.py`
vllm.author: dtransposed
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
I am currently using benchmark scripts to profile one of the Next Edit Prediction (NEP) models, zeta on their dataset.
This dataset is functionally similar to the existing likaixin/InstructCoder dataset, in the sense that it can be useful for benchmarking speculative decoding models. However, I deci

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix for the condition to accept empty encoder inputs for mllama
vllm.author: gshtras
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fix for the regression from #15428
Currently an exception will be raised when encoder part of the prompt (image) for mllama is empty

vllm.title: [Kernel] Unified Triton kernel that doesn't distinguish between prefill + decode
vllm.author: tdoublep
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
In this PR we add:

A new Triton kernel (triton_unified_attention) that works like flash_attn_varlen_func and can handle arbitrary query length. The kernel does GQA "packing" along the query dimension to ensure the Tensor cores are well used.
Added a new unit test that is based on the unit tests for

vllm.title: Fix doc build performance
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
When using sphinx-autodoc2 with a custom parser that can parse Google style docstrings (as we are):

the build speed is very slow
the build directory grows to about 35GB

This was causing problems with docs builds:

queing up for so long they get cancelled
timing out while building
running out of st

vllm.author: hongxiayang

When num_stages=3 is used as default for ROCm, some people might experience below error:

[1;36m(VllmWorker rank=7 pid=2605744)[

vllm.title: [Model] Mamba2 causal conv1d Refactor to Split Prefill and Decode Requests for Corresponding Kernels
vllm.author: cyang49
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
As a follow up to PR #16942
The CUDA Causal Conv1d kernel has a similar problem to the mamba2 ssd prefill kernels. It doesn't perform well when chunked prefill is turned ON resulting in the input batch to have mixed prefill and decode requests. This PR splits the requests, and we observe a big total

vllm.title: Removed unused marlin cuda code
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
After the marlin dense and moe refactor, we can now remove some kernels.
The original Marlin MoE impl can be removed as it is replaced by csrc/moe/marlin_moe_wna16.
The FP8 Marlin kernel fp8_marlin.cu is now integrated inside of gptq_marlin.cu as another type specialization.

vllm.title: [TPU] Add kernel test for moe_pallas
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt: First step in re-enabling the moe_pallas kernel so we can replace moe_torch_iterative for TPU

vllm.title: Replace lm-eval bash script with pytest and use enforce_eager for faster CI
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Before (77 min): https://buildkite.com/vllm/ci/builds/19384/summary/annotations?sid=0196a504-3a18-49e3-99cc-508437e21e23

vllm.title: [BugFix][Spec Decode] Fix hidden size mismatch between target and eagle head
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fixes the bug when the hidden size of the target model and the eagle head mismatches (e.g., Llama 3.3 70B).
Plus, the PR includes small code gardening for better code style.

vllm.title: [Misc] Split model loader
vllm.author: jeejeelee
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The current loader.py contains all types of model loader methods, which is not conducive to code maintenance and readability. This PR will split these loaders into separate scripts, making future maintenance and extension easier.

vllm.title: [Misc] Use `apply_rotary_emb` from vllm_flash_attn for Qwen2-VL vision RoPE
vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Since we have ported FA's RoPE kernel in vllm_flash_attn, there is no need to use original FA's apply_rotary_emb anymore
Replace original FA's apply_rotary_emb with vllm_flash_attn's

vllm.title: [Kernel] GGUF MoeVec kernel
vllm.author: SzymonOzog
vllm.bodyExcerpt: When we don't have a high expert utilisation this kernel will work much faster than matmul style moe kernel. Also adds better support for I quants

vllm.title: [Kernel] Use fused rmsnorm for some models like qwen3 series
vllm.author: Eviannn
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Some models like qwen3 series still use forward_native method when q and k need to be normalized.
The reason why fused rmsnorm kernel is not being used is that before q norm and k norm, operations like split are being done, which makes q and k non-contiguous.
However, currently fused rmsnorm kernel

vllm.title: [Misc] Remove  qlora_adapter_name_or_path
vllm.author: jeejeelee
vllm.bodyExcerpt: qlora_adapter_name_or_path is a redundant argument and is now deprecated
